creator: takeharu1219@ybb.ne.jp
text:
japanese/groff cannot be built by the following errors:
gmake[4]: Entering directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/preproc/grn'
g++46 -I. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/preproc/grn -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46  -c hdb.cc
g++46 -I. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/preproc/grn -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46  -c hpoint.cc
g++46 -I. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/preproc/grn -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46  -c hgraph.cc
hgraph.cc:48:3: warning: anonymous type with no linkage used to declare variable '<anonymous enum> polyfill' with linkage [enabled by default]
g++46 -I. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/preproc/grn -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46  -c main.cc
main.cc:129:20: warning: deprecated conversion from string constant to 'char*' [-Wwrite-strings]
main.cc:129:20: warning: deprecated conversion from string constant to 'char*' [-Wwrite-strings]
main.cc:129:20: warning: deprecated conversion from string constant to 'char*' [-Wwrite-strings]
main.cc:129:20: warning: deprecated conversion from string constant to 'char*' [-Wwrite-strings]
main.cc:165:3: warning: anonymous type with no linkage used to declare variable '<anonymous enum> polyfill' with linkage [enabled by default]
main.cc: In function 'void conv(FILE*, int)':
main.cc:520:14: warning: deprecated conversion from string constant to 'char*' [-Wwrite-strings]
g++46 -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -o grn hdb.o hpoint.o hgraph.o main.o /wrkdirs/usr/ports/japanese/groff/work/groff-1.18.1.1/src/libs/libgroff/libgroff.a -L/usr/local/lib  -lm
hgraph.o: In function `HGPrintElt(elmt*, int)':
hgraph.cc:(.text+0x17d5): undefined reference to `polyfill'
collect2: ld returned 1 exit status

Fix: 

The patch which is attached with this PR can avoid this error(As far as I know, this error is caused by specification changes of gcc).
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/japanese/groff
make install
